race.comment: ALL ADORE (8) won back-to-back races with complete authority then encountered a heavy track at Eagle Farm last start and was less dynamic. A track just on the soft side is perfect. Will spear over from a wide alley and prove hard to beat once again. NEPO BABY (1) has been beaten a length or less at her last three runs, all in stronger races than this. Tried hard but found the classy Beadman a bit too good last Saturday in the 1200m Gold Coast Guineas. Loves this trip - just wish she didn't have to lump 61kgs. CASSEROUSSE (14) goes up a level today after two wins from two runs this time in work. Goes fast so McEvoy can use an inside gate to advantage. Great chance to win again down in the weights. CANTIAMO (5)  has won four from eight, the four failures coming at stakes level. Having another crack on the back of some excellent recent form. One for the exotics. AKAYSHA (2) is a last start winner in the mud at Listed level. Might be less effective in this going but is in the mix.
